tasks.name: Default Archive & Journey Portal
tasks.feedback: 1. Tracking (0.3em) is clunky on small buttons; preserve wide tracking for titles, but reduce for action labels. 2. Mobile sticky artist column needs better visual separation (shadow/border) and spacing. 3. Sidebar 'Journey' button is too heavy; make it secondary to the Archive nav.

tasks.name: Project Declaration Modal
tasks.feedback: 1. Close button is above the header line; move it below or align it strictly with header baseline. 2. Implementation of scroll-lock is clunky; use a cleaner abstraction or ensure no layout shift on scrollbar removal. 3. Missing ES translation for the Declaration content.

tasks.name: Correction & Refinement Cycle (Urgent)
requirements: Declaration Modal: Wider layout, relocated button (after manifesto)
Renaming: 'Back to Source' (EN/RU/ES), update labels in Cave.tsx & Header

tasks.name: Aesthetic Refinement & Navigation Cleanup
requirements: Default View: ARCHIVE (Gallery Mode) strictly forced on landing
Sidebar: Cleaned up buttons, added 'Start the Journey' secondary style
Journey Portal: New minimalist frame, lower verticality, gold subtitle
Mobile Fix: Z-index correction for Close button in Archive menu
Cleanup: Removed yellow from main buttons

tasks.name: Phase 4 Stabilization & Mobile Menu UX
requirements: Default View: ARCHIVE (White mode) strictly forced on landing
Layout: Moved portal frame higher up for better focus
Navigation: Restored Project Declaration button in Sidebar (mobile/desktop)
